title: Project Manager (Germany)
required_skills: 3+ years experience in clinical study management in pharma, biotech or CRO
2+ years coordinating clinical trial management activities
Excellent knowledge of GCP and ICH standards
matched_skills: Project coordination: HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd sprint coordination
Cross-functional project tracking and progress reporting
Risk management and escalation: HSBC PMO risk escalation
missing_skills: Clinical research / pharmaceutical / biotech / CRO industry experience
Clinical trial management (CRF, TMF, site management)

core_responsibilities: Ensure successful initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, and closure of clinical research projects
Ensure compliance with study budget, project scope, and timelines
Coordinate tasks between departments involved in the project
Oversee project coordinators and site activation activities

summary: Score 23.1 (poor match). This is a clinical research project management role requiring specialised pharma/CRO industry experience, GCP/ICH knowledge, and a life sciences degree. These are fundamental requirements Boru does not meet. Not applicable.
